title: Superdry Hoodie — Royal Blue
image_captions: Blue hoodie with red 'SuperDry' logo and Japanese text on chest. White drawstrings, kangaroo pocket, ribbed hem.
Blue hoodie with red 'SuperDry' logo and Japanese text on chest. White drawstrings, kangaroo pocket, ribbed hem.
Neck tag reading Superdry Size M. Care label showing 100% Cotton. Front view showing Royal Blue Hoodie with red 'SuperDry' logo on chest.
Neck tag reading Superdry Vintage Size M. Care label showing 100% Cotton.
Vertical tape measure showing 60cm at the fabric edge.
Horizontal tape measure showing 59cm at the garment edge.
Care label showing 85% Cotton / 15% Polyester. Neck tag reading [Brand] Size [Size] [Years/Specs].
Back view showing blue hoodie with red logo on left cuff.
enhanced_description:
Superdry Hoodie — Royal Blue
Brand: Superdry
Size: M
Condition: Excellent
Composition: 85% Cotton, 15% Polyester
Color: Royal Blue

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 59cm
Length: 60cm

About the Piece
Elevate your streetwear game with this classic Superdry hoodie. Crafted in a vibrant royal blue hue, it features the iconic red logo and Japanese text on the chest for that authentic vintage vibe. The soft cotton-poly blend ensures comfort without sacrificing durability, making it perfect for layering or wearing solo during cooler days.

Style Note: Streetwear / Vintage Core

Key Detail
Red 'SuperDry' logo with Japanese text on chest; white drawstrings and kangaroo pocket; ribbed hem and cuffs for a tailored fit.

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more Superdry items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
